element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic ball control and momentum through initial paddle interaction
Player learns bouncing mechanics and point accumulation
Sequential target hitting to complete objectives and chain points
Special challenge mode with Lady (Pauline) character featuring precision platforming over paddle
Directional flow control; unused in final build but designed for strategic routing

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tension with momentum-based ball physics; relief granted through successful paddle recovery and bumper contact providing visual/audio feedback

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus minigame accessible as optional challenge after completing main table sequences
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Unused one-way gate graphics suggest hidden routing paths were planned for upper table zones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with basic bumper zones and simple roller mechanics; player learns paddle timing
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased rollover complexity; multi-target sequences require sequencing awareness; bumper placement becomes more strategic
difficulty_curve.late_game: Bonus minigame introduces precision platforming challenge; ball physics become less forgiving at high velocities
notable_spikes: Transition from bumper-focused gameplay to rollover sequencing
Bonus minigame Lady character jump timing windows

notable_level_patterns.description: Game features unified pinball table with distinct upper, middle, and lower zones rather than discrete levels. Progression occurs through point accumulation and trigger completion rather than spatial advancement
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Main gameplay table with bonus minigame mode

notable_level_patterns.description: Table design guides ball from bumper zones (momentum control practice) toward rollover sequences (precision targeting), creating natural difficulty progression within single play session
Completing main table objectives triggers optional minigame featuring platforming challenge with Lady character; separate from core pinball mechanics, providing mode variety

sources_used: tcrf - Pinball (NES, Famicom Disk System) - The Cutting Room Floor
